title: Workflows Branch Templates
excerpt: The ability to save Workflow branches with all their field values to a template that could be recalled inline as you are building out workflows. Like the GUI equivalent of code snippets.

posts.author: natecarter (Nate Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to save Workflow branches with all their field values to a template that could be recalled inline as you are building out workflows. Like the GUI equivalent of code snippets.
